structured.name: Get Custom Report
structured.objective:
To give the CSMS the ability to request a report of all Components and Variables limited to those
that match ComponentCriteria and/or the list of ComponentVariables.
structured.description:
This use case describes how the CSMS requests a Charging Station to send a report of all
Components and Variables limited to those that match ComponentCriteria and/or the list of
ComponentVariables. The result will be returned asynchronously in one or more
NotifyReportRequest messages.
scenario: 1. The CSO triggers the CSMS to request a report from a Charging Station.
2. The CSMS requests the Charging Station for a report with a GetReportRequest.
3. The Charging Station responds with a GetReportResponse.

4. The Charging Station asynchronously sends the results in one or more NotifyReportRequest
messages.
5. The CSMS responds with a NotifyReportResponse.
structured.postconditions:
Successful postcondition:
The Charging Station was able to send the requested report.
Failure postcondition:
The Charging Station was not able to send the requested report.

requirements.precondition:
NOT B08.FR.15 AND
NOT B08.FR.16 AND
When the Charging Station receives a
GetReportRequest for supported criteria
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL send a GetReportResponse with
Accepted

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
GetReportRequest for not supported criteria
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL send a GetReportResponse with
NotSupported

The Charging Station SHALL send the requested information,
excluding the value of WriteOnly variables, via one or more
NotifyReportRequest messages to the CSMS.

requirements.precondition:
B08.FR.01 AND
The GetReportRequest contained a requestId
requirements.definition:
Every NotifyReportRequest sent for this GetReportRequest
SHALL contain the same requestId.

requirements.precondition:
B08.FR.01 AND
componentCriteria and componentVariables are
NOT both empty.
requirements.definition:
Every NotifyReportRequest sent for this GetReportRequest
SHALL be limited to the set componentCriteria and
componentVariables.

CSMS SHALL NOT send more componentVariables in one
GetReportRequest message than is configured in the
ItemsPerMessageGetReport Configuration Variable

requirements.precondition:
B08.FR.01 AND
ComponentCriteria contains: Active
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL report every component that has
the variable Active set to true, or does not have the Active
variable in a NotifyReportRequest.

requirements.precondition:
B08.FR.01
AND
ComponentCriteria contains: Available
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL report every component that has
the variable Available set to true, or does not have the Available
variable, in a NotifyReportRequest.

requirements.precondition:
B08.FR.01 AND
ComponentCriteria contains: Enabled
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL report every component that has
the variable Enabled set to true, or does not have the Enabled
variable, in a NotifyReportRequest.

requirements.precondition:
B08.FR.01 AND
ComponentCriteria contains: Problem
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL report every component that has
the variable Problem set to true in a NotifyReportRequest.

requirements.precondition:
B08.FR.01 AND
componentCriteria is absent AND
componentVariables is NOT empty.
requirements.definition:
Every NotifyReportRequest sent for this GetReportRequest is
limited to the set in componentVariables.

The reported variables in NotifyReportRequest SHALL contain
variableCharacteristics.

requirements.precondition:
B08.FR.01 AND
More than one componentCriteria is given.
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL report all components that have at
least one of the given criteria (logical OR).

The sequence number contained in the seqNo field of the
NotifyReportRequest is incremental per report. So the
NotifyReportRequest message which contains the first report
part, SHALL have a seqNo with value 0.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station receives a
GetReportRequest with a combination of criteria
which results in an empty result set.
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL respond with a
GetReportResponse(status=EmptyResultSet).

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station is temporarily unable
to execute a report request
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL send a getBaseReportResponse
with Rejected.

requirements.precondition:
Charging Station receives a GetReportRequest
with more ComponentVariableType elements
than allowed by
ItemsPerMessageGetReport
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station MAY respond with a
CALLERROR(OccurenceConstraintViolation)

requirements.precondition:
Charging Station receives a GetReportRequest
with a length of more bytes than allowed by
BytesPerMessageGetReport
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station MAY respond with a
CALLERROR(FormatViolation)

requirements.precondition:
When Charging Station receives a
GetReportRequest with componentVariable
elements in which variable is missing
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL report for every variable of the
component in componentVariable.

requirements.precondition:
When Charging Station receives a
GetReportRequest with componentVariable
elements in which variable is present, but
instance is missing
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL report for every instance of the
variable of the component in componentVariable.

requirements.precondition:
B08.FR.11 AND
When Charging Station receives a
GetReportRequest with a component in a
componentVariable element that has a
component.evse.id, but
component.evse.connector is missing
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL report the component(s) with this
component.name, component.instance and component.evse.id
for every component.evse.connector, whilst taking into account
B08.FR.24.

requirements.precondition:
B08.FR.11 AND
When Charging Station receives a
GetReportRequest with a component in a
componentVariable element that has no
component.evse.id
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL report the component(s) with this
component.name, component.instance for every component.evse
field (including top level component without component.evse),
whilst taking into account B08.FR.24.

requirements.precondition:
B08.FR.11 AND
When Charging Station receives a
GetReportRequest with a component in a
componentVariable element that has a value for
component.instance
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL report the component(s) with this
component.name for every component.instance field, whilst
taking into account B08.FR.22, B08.FR.23.

requirements.precondition:
B08.FR.11 AND
When Charging Station receives a
GetReportRequest with a component in a
componentVariable element that has no
component.instance field
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL report the component(s) with this
component.name for every component.instance field or the
component(s) without component.instance field, whichever is
the case, whilst taking into account B08.FR.22, B08.FR.23.

chunks.content:
# B08 - Get Custom Report

**Objective:** To give the CSMS the ability to request a report of all Components and Variables limited to those
that match ComponentCriteria and/or the list of ComponentVariables.

**Description:** This use case describes how the CSMS requests a Charging Station to send a report of all
Components and Variables limited to those that match ComponentCriteria and/or the list of
ComponentVariables. The result will be returned asynchronously in one or more
NotifyReportRequest messages.

**Actors:** Charging Station, CSMS

**Scenario:**
1. The CSO triggers the CSMS to request a report from a Charging Station.
2. The CSMS requests the Charging Station for a report with a GetReportRequest.
3. The Charging Station responds with a GetReportResponse.
4. The Charging Station asynchronously sends the results in one or more NotifyReportRequest
messages.
5. The CSMS responds with a NotifyReportResponse.

**Prerequisites:** n/a

**Postconditions:** Successful postcondition:
The Charging Station was able to send the requested report.
Failure postcondition:
The Charging Station was not able to send the requested report.

# B08 - Requirements

**B08.FR.01**
Precondition: NOT B08.FR.15 AND
NOT B08.FR.16 AND
When the Charging Station receives a
GetReportRequest for supported criteria
The Charging Station SHALL send a GetReportResponse with
Accepted

**B08.FR.02**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
GetReportRequest for not supported criteria
The Charging Station SHALL send a GetReportResponse with
NotSupported

**B08.FR.03**
Precondition: B08.FR.01
The Charging Station SHALL send the requested information,
excluding the value of WriteOnly variables, via one or more
NotifyReportRequest messages to the CSMS.

**B08.FR.04**
Precondition: B08.FR.01 AND
The GetReportRequest contained a requestId
Every NotifyReportRequest sent for this GetReportRequest
SHALL contain the same requestId.

**B08.FR.05**
Precondition: B08.FR.01 AND
componentCriteria and componentVariables are
NOT both empty.
Every NotifyReportRequest sent for this GetReportRequest
SHALL be limited to the set componentCriteria and
componentVariables.

**B08.FR.06**
CSMS SHALL NOT send more componentVariables in one
GetReportRequest message than is configured in the
ItemsPerMessageGetReport Configuration Variable

**B08.FR.07**
Precondition: B08.FR.01 AND
ComponentCriteria contains: Active
The Charging Station SHALL report every component that has
the variable Active set to true, or does not have the Active
variable in a NotifyReportRequest.

**B08.FR.08**
Precondition: B08.FR.01
AND
ComponentCriteria contains: Available
The Charging Station SHALL report every component that has
the variable Available set to true, or does not have the Available
variable, in a NotifyReportRequest.

**B08.FR.09**
Precondition: B08.FR.01 AND
ComponentCriteria contains: Enabled
The Charging Station SHALL report every component that has
the variable Enabled set to true, or does not have the Enabled
variable, in a NotifyReportRequest.

**B08.FR.10**
Precondition: B08.FR.01 AND
ComponentCriteria contains: Problem
The Charging Station SHALL report every component that has
the variable Problem set to true in a NotifyReportRequest.

**B08.FR.11**
Precondition: B08.FR.01 AND
componentCriteria is absent AND
componentVariables is NOT empty.
Every NotifyReportRequest sent for this GetReportRequest is
limited to the set in componentVariables.

**B08.FR.12**
Precondition: B08.FR.01
The reported variables in NotifyReportRequest SHALL contain
variableCharacteristics.

# B08 - Requirements (continued)

**B08.FR.13**
Precondition: B08.FR.01 AND
More than one componentCriteria is given.
The Charging Station SHALL report all components that have at
least one of the given criteria (logical OR).

**B08.FR.14**
The sequence number contained in the seqNo field of the
NotifyReportRequest is incremental per report. So the
NotifyReportRequest message which contains the first report
part, SHALL have a seqNo with value 0.

**B08.FR.15**
Precondition: When the Charging Station receives a
GetReportRequest with a combination of criteria
which results in an empty result set.
The Charging Station SHALL respond with a
GetReportResponse(status=EmptyResultSet).

**B08.FR.16**
Precondition: When the Charging Station is temporarily unable
to execute a report request
The Charging Station SHALL send a getBaseReportResponse
with Rejected.

**B08.FR.17**
Precondition: Charging Station receives a GetReportRequest
with more ComponentVariableType elements
than allowed by
ItemsPerMessageGetReport
The Charging Station MAY respond with a
CALLERROR(OccurenceConstraintViolation)

**B08.FR.18**
Precondition: Charging Station receives a GetReportRequest
with a length of more bytes than allowed by
BytesPerMessageGetReport
The Charging Station MAY respond with a
CALLERROR(FormatViolation)

**B08.FR.20**
Precondition: When Charging Station receives a
GetReportRequest with componentVariable
elements in which variable is missing
The Charging Station SHALL report for every variable of the
component in componentVariable.

**B08.FR.21**
Precondition: When Charging Station receives a
GetReportRequest with componentVariable
elements in which variable is present, but
instance is missing
The Charging Station SHALL report for every instance of the
variable of the component in componentVariable.

**B08.FR.22**
Precondition: B08.FR.11 AND
When Charging Station receives a
GetReportRequest with a component in a
componentVariable element that has a
component.evse.id, but
component.evse.connector is missing
The Charging Station SHALL report the component(s) with this
component.name, component.instance and component.evse.id
for every component.evse.connector, whilst taking into account
B08.FR.24.

# B08 - Requirements (continued)

**B08.FR.23**
Precondition: B08.FR.11 AND
When Charging Station receives a
GetReportRequest with a component in a
componentVariable element that has no
component.evse.id
The Charging Station SHALL report the component(s) with this
component.name, component.instance for every component.evse
field (including top level component without component.evse),
whilst taking into account B08.FR.24.

**B08.FR.24**
Precondition: B08.FR.11 AND
When Charging Station receives a
GetReportRequest with a component in a
componentVariable element that has a value for
component.instance
The Charging Station SHALL report the component(s) with this
component.name for every component.instance field, whilst
taking into account B08.FR.22, B08.FR.23.

**B08.FR.25**
Precondition: B08.FR.11 AND
When Charging Station receives a
GetReportRequest with a component in a
componentVariable element that has no
component.instance field
The Charging Station SHALL report the component(s) with this
component.name for every component.instance field or the
component(s) without component.instance field, whichever is
the case, whilst taking into account B08.FR.22, B08.FR.23.
